Package gov.nasa.pds.registry.common

Interface RestClient

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable, Closeable
All Known Implementing Classes:

    • createCreateIndexRequest

      static String createCreateIndexRequest(File schemaFile, int shards, int replicas) throws Exception
      Build create index request
      Parameters:
      schemaFile - index schema file
      shards - number of shards
      replicas - number of replicas
      Returns:
      JSON
      Throws:
      Exception - Generic exception
